rationale: Based on feedback, reduce per-step penalties further (distance from -0.5 to -0.25, velocity from -0.5 to -0.25, angle from -1.0 to -0.5) and remove progress reward to simplify. Increase terminal success reward to +500 and reduce crash penalty to -10. Add small survival bonus (+0.05) to reduce net negativity without widening the gap. Relax terminal thresholds to position<0.15, velocity<0.15, angle<0.15 to increase success rate. Remove fuel_efficiency component (always zero).

components.description: Base distance penalty (-0.25 per unit distance), no progress reward to simplify
Reduced penalty for high linear speed to allow exploration
Mild penalty for non-zero angle (reduced from -1.0 to avoid discouraging necessary tilting)

components.expression: float(done) * (500.0 if (np.sqrt(next_obs[0]**2 + next_obs[1]**2) < 0.15 and np.sqrt(next_obs[2]**2 + next_obs[3]**2) < 0.15 and abs(next_obs[4]) < 0.15) else -10.0) + (0.05 * float(not done))
components.description: Large positive reward for successful landing (+500), small crash penalty (-10), and small survival bonus (+0.05 per timestep)
